# Joss Paper

## Relic Text

- Every 5 times you Exhaust a card, draw 1 card.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Strong in Fiend Fire / Second Wind / Burning Pact decks; can offset the draw loss from exhausting large hands.
